test.name: Validate Rapid Contract Option listed in JobType DropDown While Creating New Job

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To HCS
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.arg: Open Portal And Login To HCS
Open Portal And Login To VMS
Open Portal And Login To MYDEF
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(@class,'wc-card-wrapper') and .//span[contains(@class,'wc-card-text') and contains(normalize-space(.),'Jobs')]]//a[contains(@class,'wc-card-sublink') and normalize-space(.)='Add New Job']'.
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Create a Job Order Page Title
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.msg: Verifying element 'xpath://h1[normalize-space()='Create a Job Order']' contains exact text 'Create a Job Order'.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.name: Verify Rapid Contract Job Type is Present
From Dropdown Verify or Select an Option
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Enabled
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is enabled.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Get WebElements
kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
